chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1158 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 23-05-2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro,J:- Learned AAG undertakes that if any encroachment is found on Gambat Bypass road leading towards Gambat Institute of Medical Sciences, an action in accordance with law will be taken by Deputy Commissioner Khairpur and such encroachment would be removed within one month. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, hence this petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. A copy of this order be sent to the office of AAG for a perusal and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
